---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea (a new theme, a behavior, etc.)
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or theme.

**Why**
What problem it solves or what it improves.

**For a new theme**
Which OS / look, and any references (screenshots, colors, corner style, where
the window controls sit).
